title: ChestSort
description: Effortlessly sort your chests with a double-click!
body:
[![AshCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a75887d69106ed9eb2dd595176121f279523f184_0.webp)](https://www.ashcraft.cz/)

The ChestSort plugin enhances your Minecraft experience by allowing players to easily sort the contents of their chests with a simple double-click on an empty slot. This functionality streamlines inventory management and ensures that your items are organized efficiently.


How It Works:

    Double-Click Detection:

    The plugin maintains a record of the last click time for each player.
    When a player clicks an empty slot in a chest, it compares the current click time with the last recorded click time.
    If the two clicks occur within 500 milliseconds (indicating a double-click), the chest's inventory is sorted.

    Inventory Sorting:

    The sortInventory method collects all non-null items from the chest.
    The items are sorted by their type using a comparator.
    The chest is cleared, and the sorted items are placed back into the inventory.

    User Feedback:

    When the chest is sorted successfully, the player receives a chat message confirming the action ("Chest sorted!").

This plugin simplifies the process of organizing your chests, saving you time and effort in managing your inventory. Enjoy a clutter-free Minecraft experience with ChestSort!
